japanese_name: ジップロック フリーザーバッグ M
description: Ziploc freezer bags. Not glamorous, weirdly useful — separate snacks, wet towels, receipts, and the mystery liquids your suitcase absolutely cannot handle.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Ziploc Freezer Bag, Ziploc Easy Zipper, Iris Ohyama Freezer Bag, Topvalu Freezer Bag] Picked Ziploc Freezer Bag M as the most recognizable storage-bag option.

english_name: Zojirushi Kiwame-Taki IH Rice Cooker NW-VK10

japanese_name: ずんだ茶寮 ずんだ餅
